strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure hands-on at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows — directly on-target for the agentic-AI architecture mandate

Deep distributed-systems credentials: micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O, caching, and real-time data at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, plus an event-driven geo-data platform he founded and runs on Kubernetes

Fintech and commercial-stakes exposure: reshaped investment practices at RIDE Capital in Germany and owned pricing optimization across countries at Optilyz, with a disciplined engineering culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) matching the role's reliability and rigor emphasis
concerns: Career history is senior/staff individual-contributor roles; no documented experience scaling an engineering org from 10 to 30+ or developing a technical-leadership layer
Agentic AI work is recent and tooling-oriented; the resume does not evidence operating production multi-agent systems with direct financial consequences
No stated experience governing outsourced/hybrid delivery models or communicating roadmaps at board level

key_factors.factor: High-scale distributed and real-time systems depth
Fintech domain exposure in a regulated market

response.justification: The candidate combines the three pillars this role demands: current, practical agentic-AI infrastructure work (MCP tooling and agent-framework development), proven high-scale distributed-systems engineering at millions of requests per second, and fintech experience in the regulated German investment space. Nearly two decades across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems — including founding and operating an event-driven platform end-to-end — demonstrate the architectural breadth and ownership mindset expected of a CTO, while his track record of workshops, courses, and craftsmanship advocacy (TDD, pairing, CI/CD) maps well onto building an engineering culture of evaluation rigor and production reliability. Read favorably, he is a technically credible, AI-native builder whose strengths align squarely with the role's agentic-fintech core.
